title: eupatorium rosei
intro: Eupatorium rosei, also known as Joe Pye weed, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eupatorium rosei include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Eupatorium rosei can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by using the plant's roots and rhizomes in tincture or capsule form.
